commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an optional Matrix `apiPrefix` config/type/constructor option and rewrites `MatrixAuthedHttpClient` endpoint handling, with unit tests for direct HTTP-client prefixing.

PR surface: Source +28, Tests +124. Total +152 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the patch regression from source inspection: `downloadContent` passes `/_matrix/client/v1/media/download` and `/_matrix/media/v3/download` into `requestRaw`, while the PR rewrites any path not starting with `/_matrix/client/v3`. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor code changes plus after-fix real Matrix behavior proof; it should not be sent to the repair lane while the external proof gate is missing.

target.title: feat(matrix): add configurable apiPrefix for non-standard homeserver …
target.body:
Title:
  feat(matrix): add configurable apiPrefix for non-standard homeserver API paths

  Description:


  Adds an optional `apiPrefix` config field to the Matrix channel plugin,
  allowing users to customize the API path prefix prepended to bare
  endpoint paths. Defaults to `/_matrix/client/v3` (current behavior).

  ## Motivation
  
  Some self-hosted Matrix deployments route API requests through reverse
  proxies or API gateways that require non-standard path prefixes. This
  config provides the flexibility needed for those environments without
  changing the default behavior for all users.

  ## Changes
  
  - `types.ts` — add optional `apiPrefix?: string` to `MatrixConfig`
  - `sdk.ts` — accept and forward `apiPrefix` from MatrixClient options
  - `http-client.ts` — add `resolveEndpoint()` method that prepends the
    configured prefix to bare paths while passing through absolute URLs
    and already-prefixed endpoints unchanged
  - `http-client.test.ts` — 6 new test cases covering default prefix,
    custom prefix, absolute URL passthrough, and missing leading slash

  ## Testing
  
  - All 10 tests pass (4 existing + 6 new)
  - `npx vitest run extensions/matrix/src/matrix/sdk/http-client.test.ts`
target.author: papilionidae
